{{CargoRelic
|name=Curse of President
|class_id=20022
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The Koryeon Commissioner's residence is cursed. Every past commissioner has suffered an ill fate. This evil curse has eventually embodied itself into this Relic.
|fame=15
|art=19
|fth=27
|civ=19
|tech=10
|ss1=Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +2<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss2=Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +4<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss3=Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +6<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss4=Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +6<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss7=Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +6<br>Gods Descended: 30/30<br> (Awakened)
}}
